content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff` and the modified files end-to-end. The change set only updates orchestration metadata in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json` (no runtime/business logic files changed), so no implementation-level correctness, safety, or robustness regressions were identified in this patch. No amendments proposed.

## Amendments

None.
